description: Flush from the success of their debut model, Altai's next venture into producing a combat vessel for high-end corporate security around Venus saw markedly less success. While no expense was spared in arming and outfitting the Dragonfly, the compromises made to keep the ship capable of atmospheric flight, and Altai's distinctive cockpit design, quickly earned it a reputation for being a glass cannon.
